capabilities_used.evidence: 高频口头禅级规则。2025-02-27: "Market goes down - Don’t knife catch, wait for reclaim"；2025-07-18 再次重复："Wait for confirmation, buy strength not weakness"。
他反复强调震荡市不要在中间乱做。2025-02-27: "Market goes sideways - Don’t diddle in the middle, wait for range to resolve"；2025-07-18 同样表述。图 2 和图 4 都是典型周线区间/盒体框架，只在区间边界和失效点做决策。
图 2 明确画出周线 range high、range low、weekly support，并写 "buy strength above here"、"risk is buying the range high top"；图 8 也是 ETH 在水平区间上沿突破后的回踩观察。
图 2 提到 "wick refill"；图 8 是 ETH 一根大阳线刺穿前高后回落到水平位附近，明显在观察扫流动性后的承接。其推文也常用 failed breakout/failed breakdown 语言。

2024-06-25: "Whenever a market forms a failed breakdown at a level and then later comes back and closes below it again I usually assume the second breakdown will fail"，这是对失败跌破/假突破的直接规则化描述。图 2、图 4 都是在周线关键位附近等待假跌破或收复。
他经常围绕前高/前低扫一下再反向的结构思考。图 8 的 ETH 上冲前高后快速回到黑线附近；图 2 文字里直接讨论 wick、reclaim、lower high，本质就是 swing failure/failure test 交易。
虽然他不以指标为核心，但语言上强依赖 reclaim。2025-02-27 直接说 "wait for reclaim"；其图表更常画水平收复而不是均线，不过“收复确认再买”是核心执行逻辑。
2025-07-11: "carefully buy enough spot Bitcoin in the last few months to allow me to relax and ride this trend without FOMO"，说明一旦进入趋势环境，他更偏持有并顺势，而不是过度交易。图 1 也是上升后的高位盘整延续观察。
2025-02-27: "Market goes up - Don’t chase, wait for a pullback"；2025-08-13: "Then I didn’t buy ETH because it went up too much without a pullback"。这说明他的趋势参与方式不是追单，而是等回踩。
2024-08-19: "Low volatility takes your money... High volatility takes your money by making you chase and use too much leverage"；2026-04-03 也强调 crypto trader 的高波动耐受是 edge。说明他非常重视波动状态切换。
2024-10-29: "Damn open interest is really high"；2024-08-20 还专门说视频前 22 分钟讲 premiums, funding rates, open interest。说明他会把 OI 作为拥挤度/突破前压力累积的辅助框架。
2024-04-22: "I wrote a detailed article about funding, open interest, liquidations, and CVD"；2024-08-20 再次强调 funding rates。其衍生品框架主要用于识别拥挤和反身性风险，而不是单独给方向。
他长期把 liquidations 与 funding/OI 一起讲。2024-04-22 明确提到 liquidations；图 2、图 8 的 wick/sweep 叙事也符合“先扫止损和清算再走真实方向”的框架。
2025-04-11: "Watching this treasury auction to get a read on risk sentiment"；2025-04-04: "Equities nuked, BTC didn’t. What is it?"。说明他会把 BTC 放在更大的风险资产框架中看。
2025-04-11 直接围绕 treasury auction、basis trade blowup、risk sentiment 发言；2026-04-08 更把交易分析升级到 oil futures/backwardation/地缘冲突，说明收益率与流动性环境是其重要外部变量。
2024-05-24 虽然带有讽刺意味，但明确拿 spot ETH ETF 上市和机构资金配置做语境；他会关注这类流量事件，但不是主导框架。
虽然常自嘲被止损/爆仓，但整个教育内容始终围绕风险先行。2025-07-18: "risk management first"；2025-09-22 还专门反思过度迷恋表面 R:R 而忽视真实执行质量。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Level Reclaim After Damage
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a violent breakdown or trend damage, avoid bottom-fishing and wait for price to reclaim a clearly defined horizontal level before getting long.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在急跌或结构受损后，不直接抄底，而是等待价格重新收复明确的水平位/区间边界后再偏多。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-27: "Don’t knife catch, wait for reclaim"；图 4 在大阴线跌破区间后，核心问题就是是否重新站回蓝线/区间。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Mid-Range No-Trade Filter
new_capabilities_proposed.description: If price is in the middle of a well-defined range with no edge at either boundary, stand aside until range high/low or a clean resolution is reached.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当价格位于清晰区间中部、上下边界都不占优时，主动空仓，等待到区间边缘或等待突破解决方向。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-27 和 2025-07-18 都使用原话："Don’t diddle in the middle"。这几乎是他的签名规则，但 seed 里没有把“区间中部禁止交易”单独抽象出来。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Core Spot Inventory For Trend Participation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Maintain a core spot position during constructive higher-timeframe conditions so that short-term execution imperfections do not force emotional chasing.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在高时间框架结构健康时持有核心现货底仓，这样即使短线没有完美做到，也能顺势参与而不陷入 FOMO 追涨。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-07-11: "buy enough spot Bitcoin... to allow me to relax and ride this trend without FOMO"；2025-09-28: "Comfy in spot contains meaningful wisdom"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: BTC Benchmarking Selectivity
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 以 BTC 为基准的机会筛选
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use BTC as the default benchmark for opportunity cost; only rotate into alts when they can credibly outperform BTC under concentrated flow conditions.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 BTC 作为默认收益基准，只有当山寨币在当前资金高度集中的市场里有真实超越 BTC 的把握时才参与。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-05-22: "outperforming BTC is extra hard because dispersion is that wide"；其长期内容也反复强调 buy/hold BTC 往往优于多数主动交易。

personal_quirks.quote: Market goes sideways - Don’t diddle in the middle, wait for range to resolve
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 区间中部没有优势，不交易也是交易；只在边界或突破后做决定。

personal_quirks.quote: Market goes down - Don’t knife catch, wait for reclaim
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 急跌时先等结构收复确认，再考虑做多；弱势里不接飞刀。

personal_quirks.quote: Did I carefully buy enough spot Bitcoin in the last few months to allow me to relax and ride this trend without FOMO?
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 用现货底仓管理情绪和参与权，避免因为没抓到完美位置而追涨。

personal_quirks.quote: You probably don’t have a tariff/macro edge. Simplify your trading. Trade when people do stupid shit at obvious levels. Keep it short to medium-term. Trade less
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 除非真有宏观优势，否则回到最朴素的价格行为与明显位置，减少交易频率。

personal_quirks.quote: I fixated on R:R when I started trading... But it doesn’t actually work
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要把漂亮的理论盈亏比当成 edge，本质是执行质量、环境和真实胜率。

unique_traits: 他不是纯图形派，也不是纯宏观派，而是把高时间框架水平位、区间结构、reclaim/failed move 与 funding、OI、risk sentiment 结合起来，用很少但很有效的变量做决策。和很多 TA 交易员不同，他极少宣称精确抄底摸顶，更强调“别追、别抄刀、别在区间中间乱做”，以及用现货底仓解决 FOMO。其内容风格强烈自嘲，但底层框架其实非常纪律化、概率化，并且明显偏向教育型表达。

high_conviction_phrases: trade when people do stupid shit at obvious levels
low_conviction_phrases: What the fuck am I meant to do with this
Damn open interest is really high
